title: 「… is that …」句型
titleEn: Using … is that … to introduce an explanation

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Summary noun phrase + be + that + complete clause

formulas.formula: Summary noun phrase + be + that + complete clause
What + clause + be + that + complete clause

example: The problem is that we don’t have enough support from the crowd.
exampleZh: 問題是，我們沒有得到群眾足夠的支持。

examples.en: The problem is that we don’t have enough support from the crowd.
examples.zh: 問題是，我們沒有得到群眾足夠的支持。

examples.en: The problem is not that the work is difficult; it is that we have too little time.
examples.zh: 問題不在於工作困難，而在於我們的時間太少。

meaning.zh: 這個句型先以 problem、reason、fact、advantage 等名詞概括資料，再用 that 完整子句解釋內容。

rules.zh: 本課句型中的 is that 不是問句，而是連接概括重點和後面的詳細解釋。
rules.en: In this structure, is that is not a question.

rules.zh: that 後面必須是包含主語和動詞的完整子句。
rules.en: A complete clause with its own subject and verb must follow that.

rules.zh: be 要配合時態和單複數。
rules.en: Make be agree with the tense and number.

rules.zh: 本練習的目標是掌握 be + that-clause，因此答案必須保留 that。
rules.en: Keep that in every answer in this exercise.

rules.zh: 在清晰、正式的英語中，本練習採用 The reason is that，不採用 The reason is because。
rules.en: Use The reason is that rather than The reason is because in this exercise.

rules.zh: 名詞必須準確概括後面的內容，例如 problem、reason、advantage、risk 或 fact。
rules.en: Choose a noun that accurately summarises the clause that follows.

rules.zh: 可用 not that X; it is that Y 澄清真正重點。
rules.en: Use not that X; it is that Y to clarify the real point.

benefits.zh: 使用 problem、reason、advantage 和 risk 等字眼，可以先告訴讀者接下來的是哪一類資料。
benefits.en: It tells the reader what kind of information is coming.

benefits.zh: 它可以把兩句較短、較零散的句子合併成一句，使關係更加清楚。
benefits.en: It combines two short sentences clearly.

benefits.zh: 它適合用來解釋看法、指出問題、交代原因或提出重點。
benefits.en: It helps organise explanations and arguments.

benefits.zh: 選擇不同的概括名詞，可以準確表達說話者對後面內容的態度。
benefits.en: It helps control the tone of the message.

benefits.zh: 它能減少重複使用 I think、because、but 或連續短句，令表達更有變化。
benefits.en: It gives you alternatives to repetitive expressions.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using be + that-clause. Preserve the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 be + that 子句 改寫以下句子，並保留原意。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: We do not have enough support from the crowd. This is the problem.
questions.promptZh: 我們沒有得到群眾足夠的支持。這就是問題所在。
questions.answer: The problem is that we do not have enough support from the crowd.
questions.answerZh: 問題是，我們沒有得到群眾足夠的支持。
questions.highlight: The problem is that we do not have enough support from the crowd.

questions.prompt: We must leave now because the shop closes at six.
questions.promptZh: 我們必須現在離開，因為商店六時關門。
questions.answer: One reason we must leave now is that the shop closes at six.
questions.answerZh: 我們必須現在離開的一個原因是，商店六時關門。
questions.highlight: One reason we must leave now is that the shop closes at six.

questions.prompt: Fortunately, everyone passed the test.
questions.promptZh: 幸好，每個人都通過了測驗。
questions.answer: The good news is that everyone passed the test.
questions.answerZh: 好消息是，每個人都通過了測驗。
questions.highlight: The good news is that everyone passed the test.

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, the lift is out of order.
questions.promptZh: 不幸的是，升降機發生故障。
questions.answer: The bad news is that the lift is out of order.
questions.answerZh: 壞消息是，升降機發生故障。
questions.highlight: The bad news is that the lift is out of order.

questions.prompt: We can study whenever we have time. This is one major advantage of the online course.
questions.promptZh: 我們可以在任何有空的時候學習。這是網上課程的一項主要優點。
questions.answer: One major advantage of the online course is that we can study whenever we have time.
questions.answerZh: 網上課程的一項主要優點是，我們可以在任何有空的時候學習。
questions.highlight: One major advantage of the online course is that we can study whenever we have time.

questions.prompt: The room has no windows. This is its biggest disadvantage.
questions.promptZh: 房間沒有窗戶。這是它最大的缺點。
questions.answer: This room’s biggest disadvantage is that it has no windows.
questions.answerZh: 這個房間最大的缺點是，它沒有窗戶。
questions.highlight: This room’s biggest disadvantage is that it has no windows.

questions.prompt: I think the new rule is fair.
questions.promptZh: 我認為新規則是公平的。
questions.answer: My opinion is that the new rule is fair.
questions.answerZh: 我的看法是，新規則是公平的。
questions.highlight: My opinion is that the new rule is fair.

questions.prompt: In fact, the keys were in my bag all along.
questions.promptZh: 事實上，鎖匙一直都在我的袋裏。
questions.answer: The truth is that the keys were in my bag all along.
questions.answerZh: 真相是，鎖匙一直都在我的袋裏。
questions.highlight: The truth is that the keys were in my bag all along.

questions.prompt: We may miss the last bus. This is the risk.
questions.promptZh: 我們可能會錯過尾班巴士。這就是風險。
questions.answer: The risk is that we may miss the last bus.
questions.answerZh: 風險是，我們可能會錯過尾班巴士。
questions.highlight: The risk is that we may miss the last bus.

questions.prompt: Please remember this important point: the password is case-sensitive.
questions.promptZh: 請記住這個重要重點：密碼區分英文字母的大小寫。
questions.answer: One important point to remember is that the password is case-sensitive.
questions.answerZh: 要記住的一個重要重點是，密碼區分英文字母的大小寫。
questions.highlight: One important point to remember is that the password is case-sensitive.

questions.prompt: What is wrong with the printer? It keeps stopping.
questions.promptZh: 打印機有甚麼問題？它不斷停止運作。
questions.answer: The problem with the printer is that it keeps stopping.
questions.answerZh: 打印機的問題是，它不斷停止運作。
questions.highlight: The problem with the printer is that it keeps stopping.

questions.prompt: Mia was upset because nobody had told her about the change.
questions.promptZh: 米婭很不高興，因為沒有人告訴她這項改動。
questions.answer: Mia’s reason for being upset was that nobody had told her about the change.
questions.answerZh: 米婭不高興的原因是，沒有人告訴她這項改動。
questions.highlight: Mia’s reason for being upset was that nobody had told her about the change.

questions.prompt: The two phones differ in one main way: one has a larger screen.
questions.promptZh: 兩部手機有一項主要分別：其中一部的螢幕較大。
questions.answer: The main difference between the two phones is that one has a larger screen.
questions.answerZh: 兩部手機的主要分別是，其中一部的螢幕較大。
questions.highlight: The main difference between the two phones is that one has a larger screen.

questions.prompt: One helpful feature of this app is its ability to work offline.
questions.promptZh: 這個應用程式其中一項實用功能，是可以離線運作。
questions.answer: One helpful feature of this app is that it works offline.
questions.answerZh: 這個應用程式其中一項實用功能是，它可以離線運作。
questions.highlight: One helpful feature of this app is that it works offline.

questions.prompt: We are mainly worried about possible rain during the outdoor event.
questions.promptZh: 我們最擔心的是戶外活動期間可能下雨。
questions.answer: Our main concern is that it may rain during the outdoor event.
questions.answerZh: 我們主要擔心的是，戶外活動期間可能下雨。
questions.highlight: Our main concern is that it may rain during the outdoor event.

questions.prompt: We hope all the guests will arrive safely.
questions.promptZh: 我們希望所有賓客都能安全抵達。
questions.answer: Our hope is that all the guests will arrive safely.
questions.answerZh: 我們的希望是，所有賓客都能安全抵達。
questions.highlight: Our hope is that all the guests will arrive safely.

questions.prompt: The teacher’s main message was clear: students should ask questions when they are confused.
questions.promptZh: 老師的主要訊息很清楚：學生感到困惑時應該提問。
questions.answer: The teacher’s main message was that students should ask questions when they are confused.
questions.answerZh: 老師的主要訊息是，學生感到困惑時應該提問。
questions.highlight: The teacher’s main message was that students should ask questions when they are confused.

questions.prompt: The event was successful mainly because more than 500 people attended.
questions.promptZh: 活動之所以成功，主要是因為有超過五百人出席。
questions.answer: The main reason the event was successful was that more than 500 people attended.
questions.answerZh: 活動成功的主要原因是，有超過五百人出席。
questions.highlight: The main reason the event was successful was that more than 500 people attended.

questions.prompt: We do not need to pay for delivery. That is the best part of this offer.
questions.promptZh: 我們不需要支付運費。這是這項優惠最好的地方。
questions.answer: What makes this offer especially attractive is that we do not need to pay for delivery.
questions.answerZh: 這項優惠特別吸引的地方是，我們不需要支付運費。
questions.highlight: What makes this offer especially attractive is that we do not need to pay for delivery.

questions.prompt: According to the latest update, the road will reopen tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 根據最新消息，道路將於明天重開。
questions.answer: The latest update is that the road will reopen tomorrow.
questions.answerZh: 最新消息是，道路將於明天重開。
questions.highlight: The latest update is that the road will reopen tomorrow.

questions.prompt: The manager was concerned because the figures did not match.
questions.promptZh: 經理感到擔心，因為數字並不吻合。
questions.answer: The manager’s concern was that the figures did not match.
questions.answerZh: 經理所擔心的是，數字並不吻合。
questions.highlight: The manager’s concern was that the figures did not match.

questions.prompt: The project may cost more than expected. We must consider this possibility.
questions.promptZh: 項目成本可能高於預期。我們必須考慮這個可能性。
questions.answer: One possibility we must consider is that the project may cost more than expected.
questions.answerZh: 我們必須考慮的一個可能性是，項目成本可能高於預期。
questions.highlight: One possibility we must consider is that the project may cost more than expected.

questions.prompt: The medicine can make some people feel sleepy. This is an important warning.
questions.promptZh: 這種藥物可能使部分人感到昏昏欲睡。這是一項重要警告。
questions.answer: An important warning is that the medicine can make some people feel sleepy.
questions.answerZh: 一項重要警告是，這種藥物可能使部分人感到昏昏欲睡。
questions.highlight: An important warning is that the medicine can make some people feel sleepy.

questions.prompt: The council finally decided to keep the library open on Sundays.
questions.promptZh: 議會最終決定讓圖書館逢星期日開放。
questions.answer: The final decision was that the council would keep the library open on Sundays.
questions.answerZh: 最終決定是，議會會讓圖書館逢星期日開放。
questions.highlight: The final decision was that the council would keep the library open on Sundays.

questions.prompt: Under the old policy, workers could choose their starting time. This was a major benefit.
questions.promptZh: 根據舊政策，員工可以選擇上班時間。這是一項主要好處。
questions.answer: A major benefit of the old policy was that workers could choose their starting time.
questions.answerZh: 舊政策的一項主要好處是，員工可以選擇上班時間。
questions.highlight: A major benefit of the old policy was that workers could choose their starting time.

questions.prompt: The old system often lost customer records. This was its greatest weakness.
questions.promptZh: 舊系統經常遺失顧客紀錄。這是它最大的弱點。
questions.answer: Its greatest weakness was that it often lost customer records.
questions.answerZh: 它最大的弱點是，經常遺失顧客紀錄。
questions.highlight: Its greatest weakness was that it often lost customer records.

questions.prompt: The building needs major repairs. This is one clear fact.
questions.promptZh: 大樓需要進行大型維修。這是一個明確的事實。
questions.answer: One clear fact is that the building needs major repairs.
questions.answerZh: 一個明確的事實是，大樓需要進行大型維修。
questions.highlight: One clear fact is that the building needs major repairs.

questions.prompt: We will lend you the hall on one condition: you must clean it afterwards.
questions.promptZh: 我們可以把禮堂借給你，但有一個條件：你之後必須清潔場地。
questions.answer: The condition for lending you the hall is that you must clean it afterwards.
questions.answerZh: 我們把禮堂借給你的條件是，你之後必須清潔場地。
questions.highlight: The condition for lending you the hall is that you must clean it afterwards.

questions.prompt: The company expects sales to improve next year.
questions.promptZh: 公司預期明年的銷售額會上升。
questions.answer: The company’s expectation is that sales will improve next year.
questions.answerZh: 公司的預期是，明年的銷售額會上升。
questions.highlight: The company’s expectation is that sales will improve next year.

questions.prompt: The team suggested that the deadline should be moved to Monday.
questions.promptZh: 團隊建議把截止日期改為星期一。
questions.answer: Their suggestion is that the deadline should be moved to Monday.
questions.answerZh: 他們的建議是，截止日期應改為星期一。
questions.highlight: Their suggestion is that the deadline should be moved to Monday.

questions.prompt: The service is cheap, but it is unreliable. Its price is not the problem.
questions.promptZh: 服務收費便宜，但並不可靠。價格並不是問題所在。
questions.answer: The problem is not that the service is expensive; it is that it is unreliable.
questions.answerZh: 問題不在於服務昂貴，而在於它並不可靠。
questions.highlight: The problem is not that the service is expensive; it is that it is unreliable.

questions.prompt: Some people think the job is difficult because it takes a long time. In fact, it is difficult because it requires careful attention.
questions.promptZh: 有些人認為這份工作困難，是因為需時很長。事實上，真正的困難在於它需要人保持高度專注。
questions.answer: What makes the job difficult is not that it takes a long time; it is that it requires careful attention.
questions.answerZh: 令這份工作困難的並不是它需時很長，而是它需要人保持高度專注。
questions.highlight: What makes the job difficult is not that it takes a long time; it is that it requires careful attention.

questions.prompt: The document never reached the client because it was sent to the wrong address.
questions.promptZh: 文件沒有送達客戶手上，因為它被寄往錯誤地址。
questions.answer: The reason the document never reached the client was that it was sent to the wrong address.
questions.answerZh: 文件沒有送達客戶手上的原因是，它被寄往錯誤地址。
questions.highlight: The reason the document never reached the client was that it was sent to the wrong address.

questions.prompt: If the temperature falls below zero, the pipes may freeze. This is the main danger.
questions.promptZh: 如果氣溫降至零度以下，水管可能會結冰。這是主要危險。
questions.answer: The main danger is that the pipes may freeze if the temperature falls below zero.
questions.answerZh: 主要危險是，如果氣溫降至零度以下，水管可能會結冰。
questions.highlight: The main danger is that the pipes may freeze if the temperature falls below zero.

questions.prompt: The delivery arrived two hours late because the road was flooded.
questions.promptZh: 送貨遲了兩小時，因為道路水浸。
questions.answer: The reason the delivery arrived two hours late was that the road was flooded.
questions.answerZh: 送貨遲了兩小時的原因是，道路水浸。
questions.highlight: The reason the delivery arrived two hours late was that the road was flooded.

questions.prompt: The museum has extended its opening hours, so visitors now have more time to explore.
questions.promptZh: 博物館延長了開放時間，因此訪客現在有更多時間參觀。
questions.answer: One result of the longer opening hours is that visitors now have more time to explore.
questions.answerZh: 延長開放時間的一個結果是，訪客現在有更多時間參觀。
questions.highlight: One result of the longer opening hours is that visitors now have more time to explore.

questions.prompt: At this hotel, breakfast is free, and guests can check out late. These are its two main advantages.
questions.promptZh: 這間酒店提供免費早餐，住客亦可延遲退房。這是它的兩項主要優點。
questions.answer: The two main advantages of this hotel are that breakfast is free and that guests can check out late.
questions.answerZh: 這間酒店的兩項主要優點是，早餐免費，而且住客可以延遲退房。
questions.highlight: The two main advantages of this hotel are that breakfast is free and that guests can check out late.

questions.prompt: The software cannot open older files. This is its main limitation.
questions.promptZh: 軟件無法開啟舊格式的檔案。這是它的主要限制。
questions.answer: The main limitation of the software is that it cannot open older files.
questions.answerZh: 軟件的主要限制是，它無法開啟舊格式的檔案。
questions.highlight: The main limitation of the software is that it cannot open older files.

questions.prompt: The electricity bill was high because the lights had been left on all night.
questions.promptZh: 電費很高，因為燈整晚都沒有關掉。
questions.answer: The reason the electricity bill was high was that the lights had been left on all night.
questions.answerZh: 電費很高的原因是，燈整晚都沒有關掉。
questions.highlight: The reason the electricity bill was high was that the lights had been left on all night.

questions.prompt: Regular exercise can improve sleep. This is a well-known fact.
questions.promptZh: 定期運動可以改善睡眠。這是一個廣為人知的事實。
questions.answer: One well-known fact about regular exercise is that it can improve sleep.
questions.answerZh: 有關定期運動的一個廣為人知的事實是，它可以改善睡眠。
questions.highlight: One well-known fact about regular exercise is that it can improve sleep.

questions.prompt: Everyone was surprised when the quiet student volunteered to lead the discussion.
questions.promptZh: 當那名安靜的學生自願帶領討論時，每個人都感到驚訝。
questions.answer: What surprised everyone was that the quiet student volunteered to lead the discussion.
questions.answerZh: 令每個人感到驚訝的是，那名安靜的學生自願帶領討論。
questions.highlight: What surprised everyone was that the quiet student volunteered to lead the discussion.

questions.prompt: The plan must be fair to all staff. That matters most to me.
questions.promptZh: 計劃必須對所有員工公平。這一點對我最重要。
questions.answer: What matters most to me is that the plan is fair to all staff.
questions.answerZh: 對我最重要的是，計劃對所有員工公平。
questions.highlight: What matters most to me is that the plan is fair to all staff.

questions.prompt: The children remembered the safety rule after their teacher repeated it several times. This pleased the teacher.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們在老師重複安全守則數次後記住了它。這令老師很高興。
questions.answer: What pleased the teacher was that the children remembered the safety rule after she repeated it several times.
questions.answerZh: 令老師高興的是，孩子們在她重複安全守則數次後記住了它。
questions.highlight: What pleased the teacher was that the children remembered the safety rule after she repeated it several times.

questions.prompt: To our surprise, the repairs were completed in two days instead of a week.
questions.promptZh: 令我們驚訝的是，維修工程只用了兩天便完成，而不是用上一星期。
questions.answer: What surprised us was that the repairs were completed in two days instead of a week.
questions.answerZh: 令我們驚訝的是，維修工程在兩天內完成，而不是用上一星期。
questions.highlight: What surprised us was that the repairs were completed in two days instead of a week.

questions.prompt: The team did not fail because it lacked skill. It failed because it communicated poorly.
questions.promptZh: 球隊失敗並不是因為缺乏技巧，而是因為溝通不佳。
questions.answer: The reason the team failed was not that it lacked skill; it was that it communicated poorly.
questions.answerZh: 球隊失敗的原因並不是缺乏技巧，而是溝通不佳。
questions.highlight: The reason the team failed was not that it lacked skill; it was that it communicated poorly.

questions.prompt: We are not worried that the work will cost too much. We are worried that it may not be finished on time.
questions.promptZh: 我們並不擔心工程費用過高。我們擔心的是工程可能無法按時完成。
questions.answer: Our concern is not that the work will cost too much; it is that it may not be finished on time.
questions.answerZh: 我們擔心的並不是工程費用過高，而是工程可能無法按時完成。
questions.highlight: Our concern is not that the work will cost too much; it is that it may not be finished on time.

questions.prompt: The new schedule gives staff more choice, but it also makes team meetings harder to arrange.
questions.promptZh: 新時間表讓員工有更多選擇，但亦令團隊會議更難安排。
questions.answer: The advantage of the new schedule is that it gives staff more choice, while the disadvantage is that it makes team meetings harder to arrange.
questions.answerZh: 新時間表的優點是，它讓員工有更多選擇；缺點則是，它令團隊會議更難安排。
questions.highlight: The advantage of the new schedule is that it gives staff more choice, while the disadvantage is that it makes team meetings harder to arrange.

questions.prompt: The school may have to cancel the trip if the weather warning remains in force.
questions.promptZh: 如果天氣警告繼續生效，學校可能要取消旅行。
questions.answer: The risk is that the school may have to cancel the trip if the weather warning remains in force.
questions.answerZh: 風險是，如果天氣警告繼續生效，學校可能要取消旅行。
questions.highlight: The risk is that the school may have to cancel the trip if the weather warning remains in force.

questions.prompt: The report does not claim that the system is perfect. It says that the system is safer than before.
questions.promptZh: 報告並沒有聲稱系統完美無缺。它指出系統比以前更安全。
questions.answer: The report’s point is not that the system is perfect; it is that the system is safer than before.
questions.answerZh: 報告的重點並不是系統完美無缺，而是系統比以前更安全。
questions.highlight: The report’s point is not that the system is perfect; it is that the system is safer than before.

questions.prompt: The public often focuses on how quickly the service responds. However, the accuracy of the information is more important.
questions.promptZh: 公眾往往集中注意服務的回應速度。然而，資訊的準確性更為重要。
questions.answer: What matters most is not that the service responds quickly; it is that the information it provides is accurate.
questions.answerZh: 最重要的並不是服務回應得有多快，而是它提供的資訊準確無誤。
questions.highlight: What matters most is not that the service responds quickly; it is that the information it provides is accurate.
